DataRequest.title: Data Request
DataRequest.description: A request for internal data or reports.

fullName.description: The full name of the requester.

email.description: The email address of the requester.

handphone.description: The phone number of the requester.

department.description: The unit or department of the requester.

category.description: The category of the request (e.g., ANALYTICS, REPORTING).

urgency.description: The urgency level of the request.

description.description: Detailed description of the data needed.

dateRangeStart.description: Start date for the requested data.

dateRangeEnd.description: End date for the requested data.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the request was created.

status.description: The current status of the request.

requests.description: Collection of data requests submitted by users.
